content: Coverage categories (subdomain, invariant, routing, test) were clean from cycle 1 onward — they never had gaps after initial verification. Infrastructure categories (bootstrap, docs, meta-knowledge) were clean from cycle 2. Only artifact coverage and cross-reference integrity required 3 cycles. The persistent gaps were all caused by a single root issue: ghost references to the dissolved agent 'plot-architect'.
sourceEvidence: Category 1 notes: 'Clean since cycle 1'. Category 4 notes: 'Clean since cycle 3'. Category 6 resolvedFromPreviousCycles: CR-004 verified-fixed, CR-005 verified-fixed — both plot-architect ghost refs.

history.reason: Cold start — first observation from initial factory run
